title: User
description: A platform user with authentication credentials and an assigned role. Users are created by admins (POST /auth/register) and authenticate via email/password to receive JWT tokens. The password_hash is stored with bcrypt (12 rounds) and is never included in API responses. Users can be soft-deleted; disabled users (is_active=false) are blocked from login but retain their audit history.

id.description: Globally unique identifier (UUID v4). Assigned by the system on creation.

email.description: RFC 5321 compliant email address. Used as login identifier. Must be unique across all users. Stored in lowercase.

passwordHash.description: Bcrypt hash (12 rounds) of the user's password. Never included in API responses. Write-only field.

fullName.description: Display name of the user. Leading and trailing whitespace is not permitted.

phone.description: Contact phone number in E.164-ish format (optional).

roleId.description: Foreign key to the Role assigned to this user. Determines all RBAC permissions.

isActive.description: Whether the user account is active. Inactive users cannot login. Admins toggle this field; all active sessions are invalidated on disable.

lastLoginAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the user's most recent successful login. Null if the user has never logged in.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this user was created (registered).

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last modification (role change, profile update, disable, etc.).

deletedAt.description: Soft-delete timestamp. Null if the record is active. Set by admin DELETE operation; user data is retained for audit compliance.

public.description: Returned in API responses (GET /auth/me, GET /admin/users). Excludes passwordHash.

internal.description: Full record including passwordHash. Used only by auth service for login verification.

list.description: Paginated list view for admin user management (GET /admin/users).
